style_prefix: Dark fantasy card game art, Slay the Spire style. Thick black ink outlines, hand-painted watercolor texture, muted dark color palette with teal and crimson accents, dramatic side lighting. Transparent background, isolated character sprite, no ground, no environment, no shadow on ground, full body visible, game sprite asset.

wanderer.name: The Wanderer
wanderer.visual: A lone swordsman in tattered dark cloak, lean muscular build, wielding a chipped longsword, bandaged arms, glowing teal eyes under a wide-brimmed hat, scarred face

descriptions: standing relaxed, sword held loosely at side, slight forward lean, calm breathing pose
weight shifting to left foot, sword tip angled slightly up, cloak swaying gently left
centered balanced stance, sword at rest, eyes scanning forward, neutral posture
weight shifting to right foot, sword tip angled slightly down, cloak swaying gently right
winding up for sword slash, sword pulled back behind right shoulder, body coiled, weight on back foot
mid-swing, sword arcing forward at chest height, body rotating, aggressive forward lean
full extension slash, sword fully extended forward, maximum reach, lunging stance
follow-through recovery, sword past center line sweeping left, body unwinding, returning to stance
raising sword to guard position, blade angling upward, weight centering, bracing stance beginning
full defensive block, sword held vertically in front, both hands on hilt, knees bent, solid guard
absorbing impact on blade, slight pushback, sparks on sword edge, gritting teeth, holding firm
lowering guard, sword returning to side, relaxing from block stance, exhaling
moment of impact, head snapping back, body jolting from hit, pain expression
staggering backward, one arm clutching wound, sword dropping low, off-balance
deep recoil, bent over slightly, grimacing in pain, one knee dipping
recovering from hit, straightening up, gripping sword tighter, determined expression

alchemist.name: The Alchemist
alchemist.visual: A robed alchemist with goggles pushed up on forehead, leather apron over dark green robes, belt of glass vials and flasks glowing with colored liquids, wild silver-streaked hair, chemical-stained gloves

descriptions: standing with a bubbling flask in right hand, left hand at belt, curious expression, slight lean forward examining flask
swirling flask gently, liquid glowing green, left hand touching chin thoughtfully, upright posture
holding flask at waist level, both hands relaxed, calm neutral stance, vapors rising from flask
raising flask slightly, tilting head, studying the liquid with interest, weight on right foot
pulling a volatile flask from belt with right hand, arm pulling back to throw, determined expression, left hand steadying belt
mid-throw motion, arm sweeping forward, flask leaving hand, liquid trailing, aggressive stance
flask released, arm fully extended forward, watching projectile, chemicals splashing in air ahead
follow-through after throw, arm completing arc, reaching for next flask from belt, ready stance
quickly pulling a shield-flask from belt, raising it defensively, chemical barrier forming
full defensive pose, glowing chemical shield in front, crouching behind shimmering barrier, determined
barrier absorbing hit, shield-flask cracking, sparks of chemical reaction, bracing behind it
barrier fading, lowering flask, smoke dissipating, returning to standing position
hit by attack, flasks rattling on belt, goggles askew, body jerking from impact
stumbling back, a flask falling from belt and shattering, chemicals spilling, pained expression
doubled over, clutching side, broken glass on ground, grimacing, goggles hanging off one ear
recovering, pushing goggles back up, steadying self, reaching for another flask

puppeteer.name: The Puppeteer
puppeteer.visual: An elegant figure in a flowing purple-black Victorian coat, porcelain mask covering half the face, long thin fingers with glowing thread-like strings extending from fingertips, puppet marionette cross-bar in one hand, ethereal puppet spirits floating nearby

descriptions: standing gracefully, fingers extended with faint glowing strings, marionette cross floating beside, calm masked expression
fingers twitching slightly, strings pulsing with dim light, small puppet spirit drifting left, relaxed stance
shifting weight elegantly, coat swaying, strings dimming then brightening, poised posture
tilting head slightly, fingers curling then extending, strings shimmering, contemplative masked gaze
raising both hands, strings glowing bright purple, fingers spread wide, puppet spirits gathering, commanding pose
thrusting hands forward, strings shooting outward like whips, aggressive commanding gesture, coat billowing
strings at full extension striking forward, puppet spirits lunging, fingers pulling tight, maximum control
retracting strings, hands pulling back, puppet spirits returning, fingers closing, recovering control
crossing arms before chest, strings forming a web-like shield, puppet spirits circling protectively
full string barrier, web of glowing threads in front, crouching slightly behind string shield, focused
barrier catching attack, strings vibrating intensely, sparks where impact hits, maintaining concentration
lowering string barrier, arms uncrossing, strings retracting to fingers, standing upright again
struck, mask cracking slightly, strings snapping and flailing, body jerking from impact
staggering, puppet spirits scattering, some strings going limp, losing control momentarily
bent forward, mask showing damage, frantically trying to re-establish string connections, pained
recovering, strings reconnecting one by one, puppet spirits returning, mask still cracked but standing firm

timeless-wyrm.name: The Timeless Wyrm
timeless-wyrm.visual: A massive serpentine dragon with an ancient skeletal face, body covered in crumbling stone scales and glowing teal runes, multiple pairs of vestigial wings along its length, hourglass embedded in chest cavity, sand flowing through translucent segments

descriptions: coiled serpentine body, head raised high, teal runes glowing dimly, sand trickling in hourglass chest, watchful ancient gaze
slight undulation of body, runes pulsing brighter, vestigial wings twitching, sand flowing steadily
head swaying slowly left, body shifting coils, runes dimming, ancient eyes half-closed, resting but alert
head swaying right, runes brightening again, small stones crumbling from scales, hourglass sand reversing
rearing back, body uncoiling, jaws opening wide revealing void inside mouth, runes blazing teal, preparing to strike
lunging forward with tremendous force, jaws snapping, body fully extended, wings spread, runes streaming light
bite at full extension, massive jaws closed around target area, body at maximum stretch, devastating impact
recoiling after bite, pulling head back, body re-coiling, jaws closing, runes fading from peak intensity
body tightening, runes beginning to glow intensely, hourglass sand swirling faster, gathering temporal energy
runes blazing bright teal, energy crackling along body, sand in hourglass spinning, wings vibrating with power
peak charge, entire body radiating teal light, runes at maximum brightness, sand frozen mid-air in hourglass, terrifying power
energy pulse releasing from body, shockwave of teal light, runes flickering, sand resuming flow, power unleashed
struck fatally, body convulsing, runes flickering wildly, cracks forming in stone scales, hourglass cracking
collapsing, body going limp section by section, runes going dark one by one, wings folding, sand spilling from cracked hourglass
body crumbled to ground, most runes dark, only faint glow remaining, stone scales breaking apart, sand pooling
final moment, body dissolving into teal particles and sand, only hourglass remains intact on ground, fading glow

hollow-king.name: The Hollow King
hollow-king.visual: A towering skeletal monarch in rusted ornate armor, a broken crown floating above empty skull, ribcage exposed and containing a swirling crimson void, tattered royal cape, wielding a massive corroded greatsword, ghostly crimson flames in eye sockets

descriptions: standing imposingly, greatsword planted in ground, one skeletal hand on pommel, crimson eye flames steady, cape still
crimson void in ribcage pulsing, eye flames flickering, cape shifting slightly, crown rotating slowly above skull
shifting grip on greatsword, void swirling faster, subtle lean forward as if sizing up prey, menacing presence
settling back, void calming, eye flames dimming then brightening, crown stabilizing, kingly stillness
wrenching greatsword from ground, both skeletal hands gripping hilt, raising overhead, crimson flames intensifying, cape flying back
mid-swing, greatsword arcing downward with tremendous force, body leaning into strike, void blazing in chest
greatsword smashing down at full force, massive impact, crimson shockwave from blade, devastating overhead cleave
pulling greatsword back up from strike, body straightening, crimson energy dissipating, returning to stance
planting greatsword, raising both arms, crimson void expanding from ribcage, summoning dark energy, crown glowing
void tendrils extending from chest, crimson energy swirling around body, cape whipping in supernatural wind, growing power
maximum crimson energy, entire body wreathed in dark flames, void fully open, crown blazing, terrifying power display
releasing energy blast, void collapsing inward then exploding outward, crimson shockwave, cape shredding, devastating release
dealt killing blow, armor cracking, crimson void destabilizing, staggering, greatsword falling from grip
collapsing to one knee, armor pieces falling off, void imploding, crown descending toward skull, eye flames sputtering
fallen to ground, armor scattered, void gone, only faint crimson wisps, crown landed beside skull, greatsword shattered
final dissolution, bones crumbling to dust, crown tarnishing and cracking, last crimson flame extinguishing, only dust remains

molten-golem.name: Molten Golem
molten-golem.visual: A hulking rock creature with cracks revealing molten lava core, obsidian and basalt body, one arm is a massive stone fist, the other ends in a magma-dripping club, glowing orange eyes, steam venting from joints

descriptions: standing heavy, magma dripping from club arm, lava glowing in body cracks, steam rising from joints, solid stance
shifting weight, cracks brightening with lava flow, steam puff from shoulder, magma pooling at club tip
settling back, lava dimming slightly in cracks, stone fist clenching and unclenching, rumbling presence
raising magma club high overhead, lava flowing faster through cracks, body glowing orange, winding up
smashing club down with tremendous force, lava splashing on impact, full body committed to strike, devastating blow
recovering from smash, pulling club back up, lava settling, steam explosion from joints, returning to stance
struck hard, chunks of rock flying off body, lava spurting from new cracks, staggering
reeling, body fracturing further, magma leaking from wounds, one knee buckling, stone crumbling
stabilizing, cracks sealing with cooling lava, reforming damaged sections, angry glowing eyes

dark-enchantress.name: Dark Enchantress
dark-enchantress.visual: A floating witch in layered black and violet robes, long white hair streaming upward defying gravity, hands wreathed in dark purple magic, eyes glowing solid white, ornate dark staff with a cracked crystal orb, runic circles orbiting around her

descriptions: floating serenely, hair drifting upward, runic circles rotating slowly, staff held loosely, faint purple aura
hair shifting direction, runic circles pulsing, staff crystal flickering, hands with idle purple sparks
slight rotation in place, robes flowing, runes dimming then brightening, contemplative floating pose
thrusting staff forward, crystal blazing purple, runic circles spinning fast, dark energy gathering at staff tip
releasing dark magic blast, beam of purple-black energy from staff, hair blown back by force, devastating spell
spell dissipating, pulling staff back, runic circles reforming, energy fading, floating back into position
hit by attack, runic circles shattering, hair falling momentarily, losing float height, pained expression
tumbling in air, staff nearly dropped, robes tangled, white eyes flickering, trying to stabilize
recovering float, hair rising again, reforming runic circles one by one, gripping staff tightly

toxic-slime.name: Toxic Slime
toxic-slime.visual: A large amorphous blob of translucent toxic green slime, darker nucleus visible inside, bubbles forming and popping on surface, acidic puddle beneath, small bones and debris dissolved inside

descriptions: resting blob shape, bubbles forming on surface, nucleus floating center, gentle wobble, acid dripping
slight expansion, surface rippling, nucleus shifting upward, new bubbles popping, amorphous stretch
contracting back, surface smoothing, nucleus settling, wobbling back to round shape
compressing body, pulling back, nucleus glowing brighter, surface tension increasing, about to launch
launching forward, body stretching into projectile shape, toxic spray shooting ahead, aggressive lunge
splatting at full extension, body reforming from stretched shape, toxic residue dripping, pulling back together

skeletal-knight.name: Skeletal Knight
skeletal-knight.visual: An animated skeleton in dented medieval plate armor, rusted sword and battered shield, one shoulder pauldron missing, jaw wired shut, blue ghostly flames in eye sockets, tattered tabard

descriptions: standing guard, shield raised at chest, sword at ready, blue eye flames steady, tattered tabard hanging still
shifting weight on bony legs, shield adjusting position, jaw rattling, eye flames flickering
settling into stance, sword raised slightly, shield firm, bones creaking into position
lunging forward, sword pulled back for thrust, shield dropped to side, blue eye flames blazing, aggressive
thrusting sword forward, full extension, skeletal body committed to attack, bones rattling with force
pulling back from thrust, sword returning, shield coming back up, rattling into guard stance

fungal-beast.name: Fungal Beast
fungal-beast.visual: A bear-sized quadruped creature entirely covered in mushrooms and fungal growths, glowing teal bioluminescent spots, spore clouds puffing from cap-like growths on back, mossy fur underneath, mycelium tendrils for feet

descriptions: standing on four mycelium legs, spore puffs drifting upward, bioluminescent spots glowing steadily, calm beast
shifting weight, mushroom caps on back swelling slightly, more spores releasing, teal glow pulsing
settling, spores calming, bioluminescence dimming then brightening, mossy fur rippling
rearing up on back legs, front mycelium tendrils raised to strike, mushroom caps flaring, spore explosion building
slamming down with front legs, massive spore cloud erupting, tendrils smashing, bioluminescence blazing
recovering from slam, spore cloud dissipating, pulling up from ground, mushrooms resettling

shadow-wraith.name: Shadow Wraith
shadow-wraith.visual: A ghostly humanoid figure of pure shadow and dark smoke, tattered shadow robes, no visible face except two glowing purple eye points, elongated clawed hands, trailing wispy shadow tendrils, partially transparent

descriptions: floating, shadow form rippling, eye points glowing steady purple, tendrils drifting slowly, ethereal presence
form shifting, becoming more solid then transparent, eye points flickering, shadow tendrils swirling
stabilizing, shadow robes billowing in unseen wind, clawed hands slowly flexing, ominous hover
lunging forward, shadow form stretching thin, clawed hands reaching out, eye points blazing, tendrils shooting ahead
claws slashing through space, shadow form at maximum extension, dark energy trailing from claws, devastating swipe
retracting, shadow form condensing back, claws pulling in, tendrils recoiling, reforming shape

clockwork-automaton.name: Clockwork Automaton
clockwork-automaton.visual: A humanoid brass and copper robot with exposed gears and clockwork mechanisms, one large telescoping eye lens, steam pipes on back, one arm ends in a rotating sawblade, other arm has pincers, wind-up key in back

descriptions: standing mechanical, gears turning visibly, steam puffing from back pipes, eye lens focusing, sawblade idling, steady
gears shifting, eye lens adjusting zoom, sawblade spinning slightly faster then slower, steam venting, mechanical whir
settling, key in back rotating one tick, pistons cycling, pincers opening and closing, returning to ready state
sawblade arm revving up, spinning fast, steam pressure building, eye lens locking on target, pistons charging, leaning forward
slashing with sawblade arm at full speed, sparks flying, steam explosion from joints, maximum mechanical force, lunging strike
sawblade slowing, pulling arm back, steam settling, gears clicking back into neutral, resuming mechanical idle
